excerpt: A hippie commune’s pacifist ideology is tested when a violent biker gang arrives looking for a girl.
title: The Peace Killers

excerpt: Captain Christopher Lee and his gang of pirates invade a secret Huguenot colony searching for treasure.
title: The Pirates of Blood River

excerpt: Cabman Boris Karloff delights in tormenting the prominent doctor whose medical school he supplies with cadavers.
title: The Body Snatcher

excerpt: College milquetoast Frank Sinatra discovers he must assume his late father’s secret identity as a womanizing outlaw known as “The Kissing Bandit.”
title: The Kissing Bandit

excerpt: Tank commander Humphrey Bogart leads a hopelessly outnumbered group of Allied stragglers defending a remote well from a German battalion in the North African desert.
title: Sahara
